rationale: This is a classic casual puzzle/sort hook (bus jam, stylus-driven, "relaxation" pitch) that targets a broad casual — typically older/female-skewing — audience seeking calm gameplay, which directly conflicts with Archery Clash!'s competitive PvP dueling loop and young-adult-male power-fantasy positioning. The mechanic mismatch is the dealbreaker: there's no path from a top-down bus-sort puzzle to aiming/shooting archery duels without misleading creative (high IPM but terrible D1/ROAS risk). Skip unless the team explicitly wants a fake-ad puzzle bait test, in which case at minimum reshoot with an archery-themed sort/clear puzzle and align palette to the game's blue/gold rather than the purple/orange member palette.
